graphics_options: Trident CYBER9397 64-bit SVGA accelerator with 2MB SGRAM (83MHz)

Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 180 degree tilt

memory.slots: 2 sockets available for two JEDEC 144 pin EDO or SDRAM SO-DIMMs
memory.features: 32MB standard; sockets accessed by removing screw on bottom

display_options: 13.3" TFT XGA 1024x768, 65,536 colors, Active Matrix TFT, 100:1 contrast, 180 degree tilt
14.1" TFT XGA 1024x768, 65,536 colors, Active Matrix TFT

storage.hdd: 5.1GB or 8.1GB, EIDE, removable, S.M.A.R.T., supports two internal disks (16.2GB max)
storage.optical: Standard or optional: 20X-8X or 24X-10X CD-ROM, bootable, hot swapping, EIDE (ATAPI); Optional DVD-ROM drive (requires DVD and Enhanced Video Adapter for movie playback)

Ethernet: None onboard (optional via SelectaBase or PC Card)

Battery.capacity: Intelligent, left side; supports second battery in UltraBay II

ports: 2 x PC Card slots (Type I/II/III, CardBus 32-bit PCI, Zoomed Video)
1 x Video in/out (Composite and S-Video, SAA7111A NTSC/PAL, optional or standard on 1AU)
1 x Dolby Digital AC-3 connector (standard or optional with DVD adapter)
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.1, up to 4Mbps
audio: 16-bit audio chip (CS4237B), SRS 3D audio, FM synthesis
Software decodes AC3 into stereo, MPEG-2 audio decoding via software
Internal stereo speakers (front, 1W), rotary volume control (right), internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, flat (does not lift up), rear legs pop up (5.5 degrees slope)
TrackPoint with Press-to-Select, Release-to-Select, center click button for scrolling/magnifying glass

physical.dimensions: 13.3" models: 12.3 x 9.5 x 2.2 inches (257 cubic inches); 14.1" models: 12.3 x 10 x 2.2 inches (270 cubic inches)
physical.weight: 13.3" models: 7.4 lbs (3.35 kg); 14.1" models: 7.8 lbs (3.55 kg) with battery/diskette

security: Phillips-head screws on base for battery and UltraBay II bays
